title: Sawaranaide Kotesashi-kun
titleRomaji: Sawaranaide Kotesashi-kun
titleNative: さわらないで小手指くん
synonyms: อย่ามาจับนะ โคเทซาชิคุง
synopsis: Kotesashi Kouyou possesses outstanding skill as a masseur. He aspires to become a sports doctor and wants to get a scholarship in medical school. Starting spring, he attends the high school attached to Seiwa University, a sports powerhouse. Since his family is not wealthy, he has to work as a hostel manager, where he is also allowed to stay, to pay for his school expenses. There he encounters high school girl athletes with various problems. Kotesashi's job is to take care of them physically and mentally and be the hostel manager. (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Shino & Ren
titleRomaji: Shino to Ren
titleNative: 志乃と恋
synopsis: The tomboy and the quiet girl don't seem to have much in common at first glance, except that they're head over heels in love. Ren is loud, brash, and possessive—a far cry from Shino's calmer, more reserved demeanor. But hey, sparks fly in the most unlikely cases, and this couple can barely keep their hands off each other. Between Ren's aggressive flirting and Shino's adorable personality, if one of them isn't blushing, whoever's reading along with them sure will be. (Source: Yen Press)

synonyms: Middle-School Sasha and Her Otaku Classmate
JC Sasha and Her Otaku Classmate
synopsis: I am an aspiring mangaka, currently assisting in the production of erotic doujinshi as a middle school student. While I was reading doujinshi at school, a beautiful girl very interested in erotic things, Sasha-san, suddenly called me "Master"!? The story of a beautiful, cheerful girl volunteering to be my ecchi disciple. (Source: Kadokawa, translated) Note: Originally published as a Twitter webcomic. Began serialization in ComicWalker on February 5, 2022.

title: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onna Shishoutachi ga Ikusei Houshin wo Megutte Shuraba
titleEnglish: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleNative: 最強女師匠たちが育成方針を巡って修羅場
synonyms: The Strongest Female Masters Are Warring Over Training Policy
synopsis: “These three could destroy the country all by themselves if they wanted… But there was one thing they just couldn't get.” For the three strongest adventurers in the world, finding a man strong enough to be with them is a herculean task. He simply doesn’t exist. With that in mind, they decide to take on a perfect novice—the level-zero, unremarkable Cross Alacart—and train him up to be their perfect match. Freshly expelled from Adventurers’ school, Cross sets his eyes on redemption; training hard and learning to believe in himself along the way. (Source: Comikey)

titleNative: 夜鷹ふたたび
synopsis: That woman is "Yotaka." Once famous in the underworld as the strongest assassin, she is now a 33-year-old (and very unlucky) drug addict and alcoholic. She's enjoying her unemployed life in a rundown apartment. ♪ With her mind and body completely slack, Yotaka receives an invitation from her assassin friend, "Kohai," to return to active duty...!! Will she return to the battlefield once again?! Yotaka!!! (Source: Kodansha, translated)
